nasb.text: Then he said, “Please speak to Solomon the king, for he will not refuse you, that he may give me Abishag the Shunammite as a wife.”

esv.text: And he said, “Please ask King Solomon—he will not refuse you—to give me Abishag the Shunammite as my wife.”

cnv.text: 他說：“求你向所羅門王說，請他把書念的女子亞比煞賜給我作妻子，因為他必不會拒絕你。”

ccb.text: 他说：“请你求所罗门王将那书念女子雅比莎赐我为妻，他不会拒绝你。”
